case_title: HERBERT FERRETTE VS. GLEN RAPP ET AL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,635.49 FILED BY FERRETTE, HERBERT DBA. FIRST GENERATION FERNADEZ, YVETTE AS TO DEFENDANT RAPP, GLEN CULLINS, BILL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-03-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FERRETTE, HERBERT DBA. FIRST GENERATION FERNADEZ, YVETTE IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RAPP, GLEN AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUST, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST BILL CULLINS IS DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE-NO PROOF OF SERVICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
CASE DISMISSED WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO BILL CULLINS BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF OCT-03-2014 AT 8:30 AM.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT EXCEPT PLAINTIFF YVETTE FERNANDEZ WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT BILL CULLINS WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AND HE WAS NOT SERVED. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED ON 10-02-14 TO JACKSON YU. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED-UNABLE TO FORWARD"
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$35.00) SERVED AUG-28-2014, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAPP, GLEN
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED ON 10-03-14 TO BILL CULLINS. ENVELOPE STAMPED, "RETURN TO SENDER-INSUFFICIENT ADDRESS-UNABLE TO FORWARD"
